# Add Multi-Language Support to AI Agent

## Description
Implement internationalization (i18n) support for the AI agent, allowing users to interact in their preferred language.

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** Medium
- **Component:** AI Agent, UI/UX
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v1.1

## Use Case
Users can set their preferred language and the AI agent will respond in that language. For example, a Spanish-speaking user can say "Programa una reunión para mañana" and get responses in Spanish.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Support for major languages (English, Spanish, French, German, etc.)
- [ ] Localized date and time formatting
- [ ] Language-specific natural language processing
- [ ] Localized error messages and responses
- [ ] Language detection from user input
- [ ] User preference for language setting
- [ ] Fallback to English for unsupported languages

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement i18n framework (react-i18next)
- [ ] Add language detection logic
- [ ] Create translation files for all supported languages
- [ ] Update AI prompts for multi-language support
- [ ] Add language selection in user preferences
- [ ] Implement locale-specific date/time parsing
- [ ] Add language-specific natural language processing

## Implementation Notes
- Use react-i18next for UI translations
- Consider using different AI models for different languages
- Implement proper locale handling for dates and times
- Add language detection from browser settings
- Consider cultural differences in scheduling preferences
